creator: tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

I had a member of the apache@ team scrutinise the logs, it appears that you
need to reinstall devel/apr following the instructions in /usr/ports/UPDATING.

I installed apr/apache/php/squirrelmail on a clean machine and all worked
fine for me.


Thomas

- -- 
Thomas Abthorpe		| FreeBSD Committer
tabthorpe@FreeBSD.org	| http://people.freebsd.org/~tabthorpe
